transcript: A final friendly for France ahead of their Euro 2024 opener against Austria a week tomorrow and for Canada who kick off their debut appearance at the Copa America three days later against Holders Argentina, the team that beat the French in the last World Cup final. No Kylian Mbappe in the starting line-up for France tonight, he missed training yesterday as a precautionary measure because of a back problem, so record scorer Olivier Giroud comes in and captains the side in what is set to be his final cap on French soil Jesse Marsh makes just the one change for Canada from his first match in chance that four nil defeat against the Dutch on Thursday that's in goal where Maxime Crapeau comes in new side It, Paravinga, Torreal slipping it through, Porteo and Andes who will reach it, and it was dealt with by Cornelius, got to it, got numbers forward quickly in support of that counter, now they have to hurry back again, with Dembele gliding through the gears, prodding it through impressively for N'Golo Conte, and Crape in the way has only ever scored two goals for his country, that was close to adding to that tally here Krepos had his angles covered, Champions League in November of 2020 there goes Griezmann he's away from Cornelius he's had support arriving in the middle, oh so close from Thuram as that was in. Slightly different role for Marcus Thuram tonight with Giroud also in the side, usually one or the other. Saliba at the end of it, Griezmann takes over, and he's going to take on the shot which wasn't far away tayo hernandez johnston was late having committed to the challenge early and out comes the yellow car from referee kind of got his foot to that first and was caught as he played the pass in the direction of David. Put it in from Klubbrugge. Stacchio, he's a Champions League regular with Porto. He's going to take the corner here off Griezmann's head. That's Johnston's effort which was always just looping over. Porto couldn't gather it though, they've had a little bit of a meal of that eventually are able to clear it away and now maybe come clear on the counter Canada with Miller taking the pass from Jonathan David and it does go from the edge of one area to the other and then back off the bars tonight let's have another look at it took on kunday bent it beautifully away from the dive of mike manuel who didn't get anything on all this for france canada having to do a lot of work without the ball and by dembele buchanan's header wasn't a good one back in by griezmann swipe it out from jeru dembele in towards jeru again and straight to antoine griezmann if he can reach it it's asking a lot of him it's a really valiant attempt to kick that in and Saliba did equally well really to prevent the corner assisted referee steps in Torensio not signing off with the goal that he hoped for but he's likely still to have a big part to play this summer injury absence he missed the end of the Bundesliga season with Bayern he is on as is Mbappe for Dembele in the other change Davies Miller slipping it through for Jonathan David opens up for here, Osorio in the middle, brilliant from Saliba. David's away from Coman, those two club mates of course at Bayern, and then David was trying to put that on a plate wasn't he for Jonathan Osorio. Pocket pick for a moment by N'Golo Kante, another excellent game. Now in by Shaul Koundé towards Mbappe who goes down and looks at the referee. as Koundé's cross and he's battling with Buchanan back this year. Feels a lot more freedom with Kraus, who come forward here with Kingsley Comer. Mbappé steps over it, Bradley Barker leaves it for his captain. Kylian Mbappé is going to have a go, but never really got hold of it. At the end of the half either, Kamavinga picks the pass for Mbappé. He will run here at Larea. Kylian Mbappé does beautifully. Shot saved by Krep. Their draw here, because it is the last action, France frustrated in their final fixture before the Euro, kept out by Canada, who had chances of their own for a famous win.
